# Handoff — ASAP Incoherence Explorer (regenerated by /leave, 2026-07-19)

## State
- **App LIVE**: https://hoomham.github.io/asap-incoherence/ — CI green, deployed = HEAD.
- Repos: root `HoomHam/asap-incoherence` (public, Pages CI), workspace
  `HoomHam/asap-incoherence-workspace` (private). Both clean + pushed.
- §9 definition-of-done fully met on 2026-07-18; session 1 then added, per Hooman:
  n down to 0.5 (F15), per-charge trajectory colors, Polyhedron tab (Thomson names,
  min angle, sequence animation w/ jet trails), PSF fountain (360 rays × 512 pts),
  arbitrary even PSF size 16–128 (F16), tab reorder (Polyhedron default first).
- Golden validation: all 6 acceptance numbers PASS ≤0.2% in-browser (About tab button).

## Key facts (details in workspace/canon/facts.md)
- F12 gridding params σ=2/W=4/Beatty locked, matches finufft 4e-4.
- F14 golden = measured scanner traj, NOT reproducible by kasap defaults; app ω = 2π·k·FOV/ms.
- F15 n valid 0.5–1.5; n≳3 @ v3 timing → NaN (guarded + warned in UI).
- F16 any even PSF N 16–128, grid rounds to pow2; N>64 costs like 128.

## Next steps (in likely order)
1. Hooman drives the science: rotation-angle slider sweep (the ~6.5-ilv sub-period
   question, F3), n-sweep vs incoherence (n=0.8 gives coh 2.01 vs 1.50 @ n=2).
2. Animation polish if asked: speed slider instead of fixed 6 s/rep.
3. Perf if it annoys: full-set PSF ~12 s WASM (no threads on Pages — COOP/COEP).

## Open questions
- None blocking. GitHub Pages caches index.html ~10 min — tell Hooman to hard-refresh
  after any deploy.

## Pointers
- Canon: workspace/canon/{ledger,facts,cards,tree}.md
- Engine: csrc/kasap_api.c (parameterized generator), csrc/nufft.c (gridding NUFFT+FFT)
